message.content: Estimate the effect of training on the probability of finding a job.

content.thinking: Binary outcome. Let me try a logit model first.
Let me also try a probit model for robustness.
I'll also try a linear probability model as a sensitivity check.

content.text: Logit gives marginal effect 0.12, probit gives 0.11, LPM gives 0.10. Using logit as the headline.
